title: Share board with another Monday account
excerpt:
We work with vendors and some use Monday.com. It would be great to collaborate with them using shared Monday boards. 
I would like to be able to add any Monday.com user to my board and we can both work in that board even…

posts.author: michael_adams1 (Michael Adams)
posts.cookedHtml:
We work with vendors and some use Monday.com. It would be great to collaborate with them using shared Monday boards.

I would like to be able to add any Monday.com user to my board and we can both work in that board even though that user is not in my account.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Michael!

Can you let me know why our Guest function wouldn’t work for you here? You can then invite any user external to your monday.com account in your shareable board for collaboration.

  • How to share projects with guests?

posts.author: michael_adams1 (Michael Adams)
posts.cookedHtml: @BiancaT because the user (guest user in your example) already has a Monday.com account. If I add them as a guest, they will have 2 login’s right (one for their Monday account and a 2nd as this guest user)?
